GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [w_substr@0 ASC, sm_type@1 ASC, cc_name_lower@2 ASC]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[w_substr@0 ASC, sm_type@1 ASC, cc_name_lower@2 ASC], fetch=100
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[w_substr@0 as w_substr, sm_type@1 as sm_type, lower(cc_name@2) as cc_name_lower, sum(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk <= Int64(30) THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END)@3 as 30 days, sum(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk > Int64(30) AND catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk <= Int64(60) THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END)@4 as 31-60 days, sum(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk > Int64(60) AND catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk <= Int64(90) THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END)@5 as 61-90 days, sum(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk > Int64(90) AND catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk <= Int64(120) THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END)@6 as 91-120 days, sum(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk > Int64(120) THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END)@7 as >120 days]
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[w_substr, sm_type, cc_name], aggr=[sum(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk <= Int64(30) THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk > Int64(30) AND catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk <= Int64(60) THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk > Int64(60) AND catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk <= Int64(90) THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk > Int64(90) AND catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk <= Int64(120) THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk > Int64(120) THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7895160
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([w_substr@0, sm_type@1, cc_name@2], 8), input_partitions=8
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[w_substr, sm_type, cc_name], aggr=[sum(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk <= Int64(30) THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk > Int64(30) AND catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk <= Int64(60) THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk > Int64(60) AND catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk <= Int64(90) THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk > Int64(90) AND catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk <= Int64(120) THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk - catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk > Int64(120) THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END)]
              GpuProjectExec: expr=[cs_ship_date_sk@1 - cs_sold_date_sk@0 as __common_expr_1, w_substr@2 as w_substr, sm_type@3 as sm_type, cc_name@4 as cc_name]
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7895160
                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, cs_ship_date_sk@1)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7895160
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7895160
                          GpuFilterExec: predicate=d_month_seq@1 >= 1200 AND d_month_seq@1 <= 1211, projection=[0]
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=7895160
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7895160
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([cs_ship_date_sk@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuProjectExec: expr=[cs_sold_date_sk@1 as cs_sold_date_sk, cs_ship_date_sk@2 as cs_ship_date_sk, w_substr@3 as w_substr, sm_type@4 as sm_type, cc_name@0 as cc_name]
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7895160
                            GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(cc_call_center_sk@0, cs_call_center_sk@2)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 5, 6]

                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([cc_call_center_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=1

                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7895160
                                      GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(sm_ship_mode_sk@0, cs_ship_mode_sk@3)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 4, 6]

                                          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([sm_ship_mode_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=1

--- memory ---
total_estimate_cost=5568
